summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Phase 2 (Menu Overhaul) and Phase 3 (Subscription Wizard). All 15 features tested successfully. All 5 menu pages (Svadista, Prasada, Breakfast, Snacks, Menu) render correctly with proper theming, sticky filters, food cards with images, and CTAs. Subscription wizard 4-step flow works perfectly with validation.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Sticky filters work correctly on all 5 menu pages
Subscription wizard validation prevents proceeding without required selections
Mobile responsiveness is excellent - all pages stack properly
Color themes are consistent: Svadista (earthy red #8B3A3A), Prasada (green #4A7C59), Breakfast (golden #B8860B), Snacks (dark #2D2422), Menu (burgundy #800020)
Header dropdown includes Breakfast and Full Menu links
Snacks & Pickles nav link works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 and Phase 3 features fully tested. All menu pages have sticky filters, food cards with images, spice meters, veg/non-veg indicators, and Add buttons. Subscription wizard has 4 steps with proper validation. Mobile responsive design verified.

svadista_page.details: Earthy red hero, sticky filter bar (All/Starters/Curries/Biriyanis), 4 food cards with images, spice meter (5 flames), non-veg indicators (red), Add buttons, Subscribe CTA

prasada_page.details: Green hero, purity promise banner (Separate Kitchen, Different Utensils, Pure Oils, Temple-Style Purity), sticky filter (All/Rice/Prasadam Specials/Curries), 6 food cards with green theme, veg indicators (green), Sacred Occasions section

breakfast_page.details: Golden hero, sticky filter (All/Tiffins/Snacks), 4 food cards, accompaniments section (Sambar, Coconut Chutney, Tomato Chutney, Podi with Ghee), Subscribe CTA

snacks_page.details: Dark hero, UK-Wide delivery banner, sticky filter (All/Pickles/Podis/Sweets), 6 product cards, gifting section with enquiry button

menu_page.details: Full menu hero, combined sticky filter (All Dishes/Non-Veg/Vegetarian/Prasada/Breakfast/Pickles/Podis), 20 items total, links to sub-menus (Svadista Menu, Prasada Menu, Breakfast)

subscription_wizard_step1.details: Duration selection (Weekly Trial/Monthly Saver/Family Plan), 'Most Popular' badge on Monthly, selection highlights with border, Next button disabled without selection

subscription_wizard_step2.details: Box Type selection (Prasada/Svadista/Mixed) with icons and included items list, Back button visible, Next button disabled without selection

subscription_wizard_step3.details: Preferences checkboxes (No Onion/Garlic, Less Spicy, Extra Spicy, No Egg, Jain, No Mushroom, No Brinjal, Gluten-Free), date picker, Next enabled (preferences optional)

subscription_wizard_step4.details: Summary shows plan, box type, preferences, total price, per-meal price, Confirm Subscription button

wizard_navigation.details: Next/Back buttons work correctly, step indicator shows progress with checkmarks for completed steps

wizard_validation.details: Cannot proceed from Step 1 without duration selection, cannot proceed from Step 2 without box selection, Step 3 allows proceeding without preferences

sticky_filters.details: All 5 menu pages have sticky filters that remain visible on scroll and function correctly

header_navigation.details: Menus dropdown includes Prasada, Svadista, Breakfast, Full Menu links. Snacks & Pickles nav link works. All navigation routes correctly.

mobile_responsiveness.details: All pages stack properly on mobile (390x844), hamburger menu works, wizard steps display correctly on mobile

food_cards.details: All food cards show images, prices, descriptions, spice meters, veg/non-veg indicators, Add buttons

pages_tested.notes: Non-veg menu with earthy red theme, 4 dishes
Pure veg menu with green theme, 6 dishes
NEW breakfast page with golden theme, 4 items
NEW snacks/pickles/podis page with dark theme, 6 products
Overhauled combined menu with all categories, 20 items

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED in /app/frontend/src/mockData.js - No backend API calls
